name: toeicpass
description: TOEIC learning and enterprise IP test platform monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run -w apps/api build && npm run -w apps/web build
scripts.build:packages: npm run -w @toeicpass/shared build && npm run -w @toeicpass/conversation-ai build && npm run -w @toeicpass/ad-system build && npm run -w @toeicpass/word-annotation build
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:packages" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web:hot"
scripts.dev:packages: concurrently "npm run -w @toeicpass/shared build -- --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "npm run -w @toeicpass/conversation-ai build -- --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "npm run -w @toeicpass/ad-system build -- --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "npm run -w @toeicpass/word-annotation build -- --watch --preserveWatchOutput"
scripts.dev:web: npm run -w apps/web start || (npm run -w apps/web build && npm run -w apps/web start)
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run -w apps/api test && npm run -w apps/web test
scripts.lint: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck:packages && npm run -w apps/api lint && npm run -w apps/web lint
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run -w @toeicpass/shared typecheck && npm run -w @toeicpass/conversation-ai typecheck && npm run -w @toeicpass/ad-system typecheck && npm run -w @toeicpass/word-annotation typecheck
scripts.build:dict: node apps/web/scripts/build-en-dict-sqlite.mjs ecdict-tmp/stardict.db apps/web/public/dict/en && node apps/web/scripts/build-ja-dict.mjs jmdict-tmp/jmdict-eng-3.6.2.json apps/web/public/dict/ja

author: toeicPass
